title: Agent 跨 Context Window 丢失进度
title_en: Agent Loses Progress Across Context Windows

body.problem: 复杂任务跨多个 context window。每个新 session 从空白上下文开始——agent 不知道之前做了什么、做到哪里、下一步是什么。它要么重新猜测状态（浪费时间），要么继续写半实现的功能（留下烂摊子）。
body.solution: 用文件系统作为跨 session 的持久状态。具体做法：① 用 claude-progress.txt 记录已完成工作和下一步任务；② 每次 session 结束时 git commit，保留可回退的干净状态；③ 新 session 开始时先读进度文件和 git log，再行动。
body.keyTakeaway: Context window 是无状态的，文件系统是有状态的。将状态外化到文件和 git history，agent 才能在会话间真正"记住"发生了什么。

body_en.problem: Complex tasks span multiple context windows. Each new session starts blank — the agent doesn't know what was done, how far along the project is, or what comes next. It either wastes time re-discovering state, or continues building on a half-finished, undocumented feature.
body_en.solution: Use the file system as persistent cross-session state. Specifically: ① Write a claude-progress.txt with completed work and next steps; ② git commit at the end of every session for a clean, recoverable state; ③ At the start of each new session, read the progress file and git log before doing anything.
body_en.keyTakeaway: Context windows are stateless; the file system is not. Externalizing state into files and git history gives agents real memory across sessions.
